chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-606 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 31.10.2024 Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh. ----- None present for the Petitioner. Primarily the prayer is that the Complaint Dated 08.03.2024 be decided by the Respondents in terms of Rule 31 of SPPRA Rules, 2010. Learned AAG present has no objection if the Application is still pending. Petition is disposed of by directing the Respondent No.2 to decide the matter within the parameters of Law and Rules and communicate the Decisions to Petitioner. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
